Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Way]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — A spatial rift is a slit in the Way.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Way is a force that provides stability and order to worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Way can be used to reinforce structures for stability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Way is a vine that connects Iterations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel stepped into the Way.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Way is the power of order that runs through all Iterations and provides power to the Abidan.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Way is a power that can be manipulated and provides authority to Judges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Way can be rendered powerless to Abidans in a world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Way can be severed.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Way is mapped as a single blue light with branches of sapphire light and white spots representing Iterations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Charity can pull people through a fold in the Way.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The Way is a method of reaching through space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Northstrider stepped into the Way.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — The Way provides power used by the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Suriel can channel the Way to restore order and reverse damage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Way is a branching structure of existence where Iterations are spots of light.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Way is being disrupted by chaotic interference.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The hold of the Way can slip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Fathom is located between the Way and the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Way is a concept connected to the stability of Iterations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Armor flows through the Way.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Way is a strange sapphire world beyond space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Way is a connection that can be weakened by destroying planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage attempts to escape by traveling through the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Suriel refers to the Way Between Worlds simply as the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon can punch his fist into the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — A world's temporal stability is linked to its relationship with the Way.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — The Way is a rich blue river with currents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Bow of the Silent King touches the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Way has currents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Way can shift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Way is a chaotic place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider emerged from a bright blue twist in the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Way can be used to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon's will prevents escape through the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon gives Northstrider permission to open the Way within the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Reigan tried to touch the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Yerin cut a hole in the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — The Way can be commanded to restore damage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon hoped for a deeper connection to the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Way consists of flows that can buffet travelers.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Way is a medium or space that can be bound to destinations by the Fox Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Way exists outside the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — A world's human population ties them to the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon does not draw on the Way for power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Way can manifest as a symbol complex in Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan have special authority over the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Cirian could not muster his connection to the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Sensing the Way begins with learning to sense oneself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Way is a location that can be entered via portals and contains branches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Way is involved in the process of creation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
